Event: Magic Well - November 2025
Event Date: 06/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM268


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Emerald Guardian Amulet

Once in a while, the unit disarms 3 random enemy units, and strips them of armor. For 4 sec., disarmed enemy units are unable to use weapon abilities. They also lose 55% armor stats, and cannot use armor abilities for 4 sec. The unit also deals 375000 physical damage to them, and restores 437500 health to self.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec
